title: Time Series Model Diagnostic Checking Process
description: A flowchart depicting the iterative process of diagnosing and refining a time series model by analyzing its residuals.
relationships: Flow from Fitted Model to Residuals calculation
Flow from Residuals to various Analysis Tests
Flow from Test Results to a Decision: Pass or Fail Diagnostics
Feedback loop from Fail Decision back to create a Refined Model
Flow from Pass Decision to Final Model
